results.notes: Pure activated tap-target ability — no trigger/replacement angle.

results.engine_gap: activated ability ({1}, sac: draw + role token), sorcery-speed restriction
results.notes: Single activated draw + Role-token attach ability — no static angle.

results.engine_gap: activated {1}{U}: untap; stun-counter as-it-untaps replacer (handled engine-side)
results.notes: ETB self-tap and add three stun counters via make_etb_trigger emitting TAP + COUNTER_ADDED. Activated untap remains engine gap.
Replacement effect that doubles other triggered abilities caused by ETB — no engine support. Adventure side also gap.

results.engine_gap: planeswalker loyalty abilities; pay-life-as-mill replacement (no LIFE_PAYMENT event)
results.notes: Static replaces life-payment with library exile — life payment is cost-time, not event-time. Loyalty abilities not yet target-aware.

results.engine_gap: Equipment attach + Celebration mechanic; +2/+0 to equipped
results.notes: Celebration explicitly listed as engine gap in briefing; Equipment auto-attach also unmodelled.

results.engine_gap: activated ability ({1}, sac: target + Role token attach)
ability-grant aura over filter set ({2}, sac artifact: damage)
results.notes: Grants activated abilities to all artifacts you control — no engine support for ability-granting.
Celebration is engine gap per briefing; nth-spell cost-reduction also gap.

results.engine_gap: activated ability ({3}{G}: +1/+1 counter on self); ward as keyword text only
results.notes: Pure activated counter ability. Ward {2} is keyword text on the card factory.

results.engine_gap: mana-production multiplier on basic-land tap; Adventure mechanic
results.notes: Mana is added directly via mana_system.produce_mana before MANA_PRODUCED is emitted, so a TRANSFORM cannot scale the actual pool. Adventure side also gap.

results.engine_gap: activated copy-from-graveyard ability with X-cost; activated {T} loot
results.notes: Both abilities are activated — no trigger angle.

results.engine_gap: activated copy-enchantment ability; name-uniqueness target predicate; Aura untap-and-scry rider
results.notes: Whole card is one activated ability.

results.engine_gap: spend-mana-as-any-color static; activated-ability grant from exiled cards; activated {T}: exile from gy
results.notes: Three layered effects, none expressible without activated-ability framework or ability-grant infrastructure.

results.engine_gap: activated tap-target with conditional cost reduction; activated sac-draw
modal activated ability with once-each-mode tracking
as-enters color choice + chosen-color mana ability; activated sac-to-return-Adventure-card
results.notes: Choose-a-color ETB choice that drives a downstream mana ability — no engine support. Activated sac/return also gap.
